name: Compagnie Generale des Etablissements Michelin Societe en commandite par actions
summary: Compagnie Generale des Etablissements Michelin SCA designs, manufactures, and sells tires for all types of vehicles, publishes maps and guides, and offers digital services. The company is headquartered in Clermont-Ferrand, France. Michelin operates globally, offering tires and related services for cars, trucks, motorcycles, and aircraft, as well as lifestyle products.
